UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAPUNAR, NICHOLAS A AS TO DEFENDANT PORTNOY, SERGEI ARUTYLINOVA, KARINA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PORTNOY, SERGEI ARUTYLINOVA, KARINA

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAPUNAR, NICHOLAS A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-22-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-28-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/KURT HUYSENTRUYT AS COUNSEL. DEF. SERGEI PORTNOY PRESENT & IN PRO PER. MR. PORTNOY UTLIZED GOLDIE PORTNOY AS A RUSSIAN INTERPRETOR FOR THESE PROCEEDINGS. DEF. KARINA ARUTYLINOVA WAS NOT PRESENT, BUT MR. PORTNOY REPRESENTED TO THE COURT HIS AUTHORIZATION TO ENTER INTO THIS SETTLEMENT ON BEHALF OF HIS WIFE. JOHN LEWIS WAS THE REPORTER. CASE SETTLED BY STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR PL. - WRIT FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 435 WARREN DR, #3 WILL NOT ISSUE PENDING PMT OF $3,900 RENT & DAMAGES WITH A $900 CREDIT. $3,000 BAL. WITH 8% INT. MUST BE PD. BY 3-31-94. IF NOT PD. PL. WILL FILE JUDGMENT FOR REST. OF PREMISES & FULL BALANCE OF R&D DUE. WHILE DEF. IS IN POSSESSION OF PREMISES ALL TERMS OF THE ORIGINAL LEASE/ RENTAL AGREEMENT ARE IN EFFECT. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIP. & FILE W/COURT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
